docket_entries.description: ORDER RE: PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST - OFF CALENDAR. TO RESET AND RESERVE
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-19-2019 IS OFF CALENDAR. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY AND NO PROOF OF SERVICE. MATTER IS ORDERED OFF CALENDAR. PLAINTIFF TO RESET THE NEW HEARING DATE, TO SERVE THE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROFF OF SERVIC WITH THE COURT. JUDGE JAMES ROBERTSON, II; CLERK S. RAVINANTAPRICHA. NOT REPORTED.

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF HERRERIA, CHESLER ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY HERRERIA, CHESLER AS TO DEFENDANT XFINITY COMCAST ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-19-2019 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
